📰 Frankel filly, whose dam won the 1m2f Pretty Polly for this stable; both juvenile runs came at the Curragh in October on testing ground, on second occasion staying on well into a clear second in Group 3 Staffordstown Stud Stakes over this trip; will thrive over mid-distances in time but can make her mark at 1m; could prove the one to beat if handling this better ground.

  {
    "course": "Leopardstown",
    "time": "14:10",
    "race_name": "Look De Vega At Ballylinch Stud Fillies Maiden",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Good To Yielding",
    "class": "",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Thundering On (GB)",
        "jockey": "J M Sheridan",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "99",
        "rpr": "105",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "42-",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Night Of Thunder",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "61.3",
        "model_pct": "10.7%",
        "fair_odds": "9.38",
        "best_dec": "2.75",
        "edge": "-24.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Frankel filly, whose dam won the 1m2f Pretty Polly for this stable; both juvenile runs came at the Curragh in October on testing ground, on second occasion staying on well into a clear second in Group 3 Staffordstown Stud Stakes over this trip; will thrive over mid-distances in time but can make her mark at 1m; could prove the one to beat if handling this better ground."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Skydance (GB)",
        "jockey": "W J Lee",
        "trainer": "W McCreery",
        "ts": "92",
        "rpr": "109",
        "or": "106",
        "form": "33265-",
        "sire": "Night Of Thunder",
        "dam_sire": "Muhaarar",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "58.3",
        "model_pct": "9.6%",
        "fair_odds": "10.47",
        "best_dec": "3.25",
        "edge": "-21.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Maiden tried at Group level on final four starts last season, showing smart level of form when second in Silver Flash Stakes here and final start when beaten under 4l in Group 1 Moyglare Stud Stakes at the Curragh; Irish 1,000 Guineas entry could well stay beyond 1m; big player."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Institute (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Wayne Lordan",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "46",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "722-",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Scat Daddy",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "56.0",
        "model_pct": "8.8%",
        "fair_odds": "11.43",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Frankel filly out of a smart sprinting 2yo; twice runner-up in sprint maidens in October when racing prominently, at Naas and when keen at Dundalk in first-time tongue-tie, clear second to a long odds-on shot; upped in trip here and tongue-tie left off (Irish 1,000 Guineas entry)."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Justiciar (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Gary Carroll",
        "trainer": "G M Lyons",
        "ts": "65",
        "rpr": "92",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "37-",
        "sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "dam_sire": "Zoffany",
        "stall": 16,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "51.9",
        "model_pct": "7.5%",
        "fair_odds": "13.27",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-2.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Wootton Bassett filly shaped well on debut on Derby weekend at the Curragh, staying on nicely from off the pace to finish third in 7f fillies maiden; disappointing favourite however in similar contest in August, fading tamely inside final 2f; should stay 1m; Irish 1,000 Guineas entry remains of interest."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Forty Six A",
        "jockey": "Seamie Heffernan",
        "trainer": "J S Bolger",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "42",
        "sire": "Dawn Approach",
        "dam_sire": "Teofilo",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "49.2",
        "model_pct": "6.8%",
        "fair_odds": "14.64",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+4.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Some debut promise at the Curragh last month, much better 15 days later at Navan, running a bit in snatches, weakening late when second in 1m2f median auction maiden; back to 1m here in what is probably a stronger maiden so will need to improve again."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Rodeo Blues",
        "jockey": "Declan McDonogh",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Blue Point",
        "dam_sire": "Kodi Bear",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "47.5",
        "model_pct": "6.4%",
        "fair_odds": "15.61",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-0.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Blue Point filly cost 75,000euros as a yearling; first foal; dam maiden half-sister to winners Royal Julius (1m1f Group 2) and Hooflepuff (prolific 8.6f-1m4f AW), out of unraced half-sister to 1m2f 2yo Group 1 winner Goldamix; newcomer seemingly the lesser likely of Joseph O'Brien's pair but worth a look for future reference."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Purely (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Ryan Moore",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "24",
        "rpr": "74",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "77-",
        "sire": "Siyouni",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 15,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "47.4",
        "model_pct": "6.4%",
        "fair_odds": "15.64",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-5.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Siyouni filly didn't count on Naas debut in October and later in month made plenty of use of when favourite at Dundalk but faded tamely over 7f; blinkers fitted for seasonal return and upped in trip."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Beatific",
        "jockey": "Gavin Ryan",
        "trainer": "Donnacha Aidan O'Brien",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "46.7",
        "model_pct": "6.2%",
        "fair_odds": "16.07",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+4.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Frankel homebred half-sister to 7f winner Yuzu (RPR 74); dam German 7.5f AW/1m Listed winner (100), half-sister to German Listed winners Diatribe (6f 2yo/7f) and Daktani (1m); market best guide on debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Elmakaya",
        "jockey": "Chris Hayes",
        "trainer": "D K Weld",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "dam_sire": "Siyouni",
        "stall": 14,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "46.3",
        "model_pct": "6.1%",
        "fair_odds": "16.33",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "-6.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Wootton Bassett filly; second foal of a 1m winner (RPR 90), a half-sister to winners Edelmira (1m4f Group 3) and Elishpour (useful 10.5f-2m), top family of Group 1 mid-distance/staying winners Ebadiyla, Enzeli and Estimate; Irish Oaks entry has to be worth a close look on debut but this trip could be on the short side; yard won this last year with a debutante."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Indomiknow (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Ronan Whelan",
        "trainer": "Henry De Bromhead",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "79",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "54-",

        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "45.3",
        "model_pct": "5.9%",
        "fair_odds": "16.92",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+4.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Invincible Spirit filly; okay efforts on both late-season juvenile runs at Dundalk without landing a blow; may want more time."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,

        "jockey": "Scott McCullagh",
        "trainer": "Mrs John Harrington",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",

        "stall": 11,

        "fair_odds": "18.38",
        "best_dec": "41.00",
        "edge": "+4.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Night Of Thunder filly is closely related to Japanese 6f turf winner Irifi (inc 2yo); dam 1m 2yo/1m2f Listed winner (RPR 105), closely related to 1m Listed winner Mooharib, family of 1m2f/1m4f Group 1 winners Rewilding and Dar Re Mi; another for market likely best guide on debut."
      },

  {
    "course": "Leopardstown",
    "time": "15:20",
    "race_name": "Leopardstown Members Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Good To Yielding",
    "class": "",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Fixation (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Ben Coen",
        "trainer": "J P Murtagh",
        "ts": "45",
        "rpr": "71",
        "or": "79",
        "form": "02612-",
        "sire": "Tamayuz",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 18,
        "weight": "9-13",
        "score": "53.2",
        "model_pct": "11.8%",
        "fair_odds": "8.44",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-5.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made an immediate impact for new yard when scoring on stable debut at Dundalk (1m2f) in November and better again when second there over today's trip following month; likely still has more to offer on turf although wide draw far from ideal here."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Syzygy",
        "jockey": "Scott McCullagh",
        "trainer": "Daniel McLoughlin",
        "ts": "56",
        "rpr": "79",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "7111-3",
        "sire": "Cable Bay",
        "dam_sire": "Teofilo",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "10-2",
        "score": "50.5",
        "model_pct": "8.8%",
        "fair_odds": "11.29",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-12.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Highly progressive from a low base last autumn, winning all three handicaps on heavy ground, at Gowran and twice at the Curragh; continued improvement on last month's return at latter venue when fine third of 25 from 7lb out of handicap in Irish Lincoln in first-time cheekpieces; encounters quicker conditions here, big player if handling them."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Sonoran (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Jack Kearney(3)",
        "trainer": "G M Lyons",
        "ts": "49",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "26403-",
        "sire": "Arizona",
        "dam_sire": "Danehill Dancer",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "10-2",
        "score": "50.4",
        "model_pct": "8.8%",
        "fair_odds": "11.43",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won 7f Tipperary maiden and then second in a Cork conditions race in first half of last season but didn't really progress; Dundalk run in November wasn't a bad effort but much more likely needed on return."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Vega's Muse (GB)",
        "jockey": "Keithen Kennedy(5)",
        "trainer": "Mrs John Harrington",
        "ts": "69",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "22613-",
        "sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Kingman",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "49.7",
        "model_pct": "8.1%",
        "fair_odds": "12.28",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-0.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Couple of near misses here last year before off the mark over this trip at Killarney in August (good); decent run at Bellewstown afterwards (8lb higher) on softer ground; one to consider."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Faoladh (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Andrew Slattery",
        "trainer": "Andrew Slattery",
        "ts": "70",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "2150-9",
        "sire": "Kodi Bear",
        "dam_sire": "Trempolino",
        "stall": 14,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "48.8",
        "model_pct": "7.3%",
        "fair_odds": "13.67",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+2.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Enjoyed a good spell of form on turf last summer, winning over C&D off 66; last month's Dundalk comeback run should have brought him on and worth considering despite high draw."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Spent All Me Money (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Wesley Joyce(3)",
        "trainer": "Adrian Sexton",
        "ts": "66",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "14310-",
        "sire": "No Nay Never",
        "dam_sire": "War Front",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "47.3",
        "model_pct": "6.3%",
        "fair_odds": "15.99",
        "best_dec": "41.00",
        "edge": "+4.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Roscommon claimer winner for Jack Davison and winning start for current yard in 7f Naas handicap last August off 72 (good-to-yielding); ran no sort of race later in month at Roscommon however and absent since."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Battle Borne",
        "jockey": "Patrick McGettigan(5)",
        "trainer": "Patrick J McKenna",
        "ts": "38",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "71",
        "form": "392100",
        "sire": "Acclamation",
        "dam_sire": "Bungle Inthejungle",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "46.0",
        "model_pct": "5.4%",
        "fair_odds": "18.48",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "10 of 13 starts have been at Dundalk, winning 7f maiden there in February; has struggled both starts since in handicaps and of limited appeal back on turf."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Va Va Vroom (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Reese Holohan(7)",
        "trainer": "Gavin Cromwell",
        "ts": "51",
        "rpr": "79",
        "or": "83",
        "form": "/5805-",
        "sire": "Bated Breath",
        "dam_sire": "Swiss Spirit",
        "stall": 17,
        "weight": "10-3",
        "score": "45.6",
        "model_pct": "5.2%",
        "fair_odds": "19.22",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "+2.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Maiden winner here at 2 (good) but struggled in handicaps in first half of last season for Jessica Harrington and never counted on yard debut here in October on heavy; handicapper relenting but still on a high enough mark; wide draw a negative."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Molto Amichi (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Seamie Heffernan",
        "trainer": "Eoin Griffin",
        "ts": "73",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "42253-",
        "sire": "Caravaggio",
        "dam_sire": "Fastnet Rock",
        "stall": 15,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "45.2",
        "model_pct": "5.0%",
        "fair_odds": "20.21",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-4.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Maiden placed several times last year including here over 1m1f (good) off 77; absent since a faller over hurdles in October and probably best watched on return."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Beat The Devil",
        "jockey": "Robert Whearty",
        "trainer": "Patrick Magee",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "82",
        "or": "63",
        "form": "224725",
        "sire": "Estidhkaar",
        "dam_sire": "Key Of Luck",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "8-11",
        "score": "44.5",
        "model_pct": "4.6%",
        "fair_odds": "21.66",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-3.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Busy AW campaign over the winter, winning over this trip and runner-up three times afterwards; ran well for a long way on latest but 1m4f seemed too far; back in trip with race-fitness guaranteed so definite each-way claims."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Merlin The Wizard",
        "jockey": "Donagh O'Connor",
        "trainer": "R P Cody",
        "ts": "67",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "570-02",
        "sire": "Camelot",
        "dam_sire": "Henrythenavigator",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "44.4",
        "model_pct": "4.6%",
        "fair_odds": "21.88",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-4.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three wins in Britain in 2023; regressive in last two seasons but best run for some time at Dundalk last month when second to an improver over today's trip under a positive ride, his second run for the yard; same mark here, could go well from a good draw."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Walhaan (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Nicola Burns(5)",
        "trainer": "Ciaran Murphy",
        "ts": "57",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "79",
        "form": "51-438",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Dutch Art",
        "stall": 13,
        "weight": "9-13",
        "score": "44.1",
        "model_pct": "4.4%",
        "fair_odds": "22.68",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Seven Flat wins include here over 1m1f in 2024 and more recently on Dundalk AW in December (1m2f); mixed form since at same venue, 1m4f looking too far on latest; marked drop in trip here and visor replace cheekpieces; others preferred."
      },
      {
        "rank": 13,
        "horse": "Little Miss P (IRE)",
        "jockey": "W J Lee",
        "trainer": "W McCreery",
        "ts": "73",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "63555-",
        "sire": "Kodi Bear",
        "dam_sire": "Key Of Luck",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "42.9",
        "model_pct": "3.9%",
        "fair_odds": "25.76",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-5.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lightly raced maiden; shaped well in Gowran and Galway maidens over this trip last summer on decent ground; opening mark looks okay so worth a look."
      },
      {
        "rank": 14,
        "horse": "Gotta Catch'em All (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Adam Caffrey",
        "trainer": "H Rogers",
        "ts": "73",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "66",
        "form": "22284-",
        "sire": "Free Eagle",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "42.9",
        "model_pct": "3.9%",
        "fair_odds": "25.99",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "21-race maiden whose best form is over middle distances; ran well over this trip at Dundalk in October when last seen but may well need this comeback run."
      },
      {
        "rank": 15,
        "horse": "Anvika (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Robbie Colgan",
        "trainer": "Ms Sheila Lavery",
        "ts": "78",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "42390-",
        "sire": "Dandy Man",
        "dam_sire": "Giant's Causeway",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "42.4",
        "model_pct": "3.6%",
        "fair_odds": "27.44",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Her wins have been at 6f-7f but best run last year when runner-up in valuable C&D handicap on Champions Weekend in September off 1lb lower; heavy ground against her final start; one to consider although lacks a recent run."
      },
      {
        "rank": 16,
        "horse": "Navagio (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Luke McAteer",
        "trainer": "Ciaran Murphy",
        "ts": "74",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "50435-",
        "sire": "Footstepsinthesand",
        "dam_sire": "Le Havre",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-10",
        "score": "41.3",
        "model_pct": "3.2%",
        "fair_odds": "30.93",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three-time Flat winner on yielding/soft for Johnny Murtagh; no success in Britain in recent years and poor form in three runs over hurdles for current yard over the winter; doesn't appeal as well treated."
      },
      {
        "rank": 17,
        "horse": "Loingseoir (IRE)",
        "jockey": "N G McCullagh",
        "trainer": "M C Grassick",
        "ts": "71",
        "rpr": "82",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "78010-",
        "sire": "Henrythenavigator",
        "dam_sire": "Jeremy",
        "stall": 16,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "40.0",
        "model_pct": "2.8%",
        "fair_odds": "35.56",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "-0.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three of seven wins have come at the Curragh, including in October off 66; heavy ground probably against him there final start; hasn't won off this high a mark so has it to do, and draw a negative."
      },
      {
        "rank": 18,
        "horse": "Pallatine Hills (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Jamie Powell",

        "edge": "-3.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Maiden ran well in a couple of handicaps last year off higher marks; usual blinkers left off for seasonal return; good draw and a contender if forward enough on seasonal return."
      }
    ]
  },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "April foal by Soldier's Call; sent off 12-1 when bolting up by 7l over C&D (soft; RPR 84+) eight days ago; has a 5lb penalty to carry and conditions may not be quite so testing this time, but that still provides a daunting level for the others to aim at."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Penny Arcade",
        "jockey": "Sam James",

        "fair_odds": "5.08",
        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "-5.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "February foal by Ardad; 30,000gns yearling; dam 7f AW 2yo winner (RPR 73), half-sister to winners Absolutely So (7f Group 3), Weekend Getaway (7.5f-8.7f) and Forbidden Land (7f), is granddaughter of 1m2f Group 2 winner; stable has a fine record with 2yo newcomers and any market support for her would be significant."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Amantha",
        "jockey": "NON-RUNNER",

        "ts": "-",

        "fair_odds": "6.46",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "February foal by Mohaather; 16,000euros foal; dam 6f-1m maiden in UAE (RPR 64), half-sister to US 1m Grade 3 winner Carressa, out of US 1m/8.5f stakes winner; stable doesn't have many 2yos go in first time; best watched."
      },

        "rank": 4,

        "edge": "-2.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "February foal by Rajasinghe; sent off 10-1 and showed promise when fifth of the 15 runners in the Brocklesby at Doncaster (5f, good to soft) 15 days ago; open to improvement, but it will be needed."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "April foal by Soldier's Call; 6,500gns foal; half-brother to winners Claim The Stars (4.7f-7.5f including AW/France/Germany/Belgium; RPR 90), Fraser Island (1m2f Flat, 85; 2m hurdle), National Glory (6f; 82), and Pickersgill (6f; 73); dam 5f 2yo winner (including Group 3; 104); stable has few winning 2yo newcomers and he has a useful standard to aim at in any case."
      }
    ]
  },

    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,

        "fair_odds": "3.66",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "+1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ran well in Group 2 Vintage Stakes at Goodwood; sacrificed in pacemaking role in the National Stakes (Curragh); beat 29 rivals to land the Goffs Million; followed that up with a front-running C&D Group 3 win in the Killavullan Stakes; talented apprentice is 2-2 on the Wootton Bassett colt who is effective on soft ground."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Flushing Meadows (USA)",
        "jockey": "Ryan Moore",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "88",
        "rpr": "108",
        "or": "103",
        "form": "122-",
        "sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "71.1",
        "model_pct": "18.6%",
        "fair_odds": "5.38",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-2.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Overcame inexperience to make a winning debut over 6f at the Curragh; did not look entirely straightforward (hung right) when beaten by a filly, Suzie Songs, in the Anglesey Stakes; doubts raised by 6l Group 3 defeat over C&D in July; however, Ryan Moore sticks with him in apparent preference to the higher-rated Dorset."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,

        "fair_odds": "11.36",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-4.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Chesham Stakes runner-up; not disgraced in a Grade 1 in Canada in September after beating good yardstick Brussels in a Listed race at Tipperary; easy ground is a concern based on his failure to land short odds at Ayr in July."
      },

        "stall": 10,

        "fair_odds": "11.75",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-2.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Long-priced Curragh maiden winner on debut last August; subsequently form ties in with smart Ballydoyle colts Constitution River and Hawk Mountain; Beresford Stakes second was advertised by Hawk Mountain in winning the William Hill Futurity; tongue-tie on now."
      },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Debut maiden winner over 6f at the Curragh; beaten 14l when last of five behind Dorset in Killavullan Stakes over C&D."

        "stall": 8,

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Wootton Bassett colt out of a Fastnet Rock mare; left an impression he would stay a lot further when winning over 6f at the Curragh on only start at two; promising."
      },
      {

        "fair_odds": "15.69",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-12.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won the first juvenile race of 2025; then third in a 5f Listed race; second to Albert Einstein in the 6f Marble Hill; fifth of 20 in the Coventry; well held in third behind True Love in the Railway Stakes; reversed form with the filly (finished slightly lame) to win the Phoenix Stakes under a positive ride; pedigree suggests he can stay 7f, ground should not be a problem."

  {
    "course": "Musselburgh",

    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,

        "edge": "+2.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Both runs last year came in maidens here (7f, good), winning gamely by half a length on the second occasion; extra furlong shouldn't be a problem now making his handicap debut after seven months off and the market should be revealing; stable also runs Just A Gambler."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Blues And Royals",
        "jockey": "Hector Crouch",
        "trainer": "Michael Bell",
        "ts": "60",
        "rpr": "85",

        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "56.1",
        "model_pct": "12.4%",
        "fair_odds": "8.03",
        "best_dec": "3.50",
        "edge": "-16.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Steadily progressive and having been gelded he did it nicely when making a successful handicap/seasonal debut at Kempton (1m, AW) last month; 3lb rise doesn't look harsh now returned to turf and high on list from the rails draw."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Just A Gambler",
        "jockey": "Callum Shepherd",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "44",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "69",

        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "50.1",
        "model_pct": "7.7%",
        "fair_odds": "12.95",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "-3.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made a successful handicap/seasonal debut at Chelmsford (1m, AW) last month and ran just as well when beaten just over a length into third of nine behind Blues And Royals at Kempton (1m, AW) 13 days later; 3lb better off, but his rival was making his reappearance; cheekpieces given a go."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Alkumatic Jo Jo (IRE)",

        "trainer": "Ivan Furtado",
        "ts": "58",
        "rpr": "75",
        "or": "69",

        "sire": "Alkumait",
        "dam_sire": "Dawn Approach",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "49.7",
        "model_pct": "7.5%",
        "fair_odds": "13.35",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "In the frame in all four starts over 7f/1m on AW/soft last year; return to this trip should suit and the market should reveal what is expected after five months off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Saxon Prince (GB)",

        "trainer": "John & Sean Quinn",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "80",

        "fair_odds": "14.74",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-3.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "All five starts for Clive Cox on the AW, beaten a short head in a four-runner handicap at Kempton (7f) last month; races off the same mark for this turf/stable debut having since changed hands for 24,000gns, but the winner didn't do much for the form next time; drawn widest."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Thestral",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "Hugo Palmer",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "67",
        "form": "51-8",

        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "47.3",
        "model_pct": "6.2%",
        "fair_odds": "16.24",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+1.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Off the mark on his second start in a Newcastle novice (7f, AW) in December, but having been gelded he finished well behind Blues And Royals and Just A Gambler on handicap debut at Kempton (1m, AW) 18 days ago; blinkers worn there quickly removed; others preferred on turf debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,

        "fair_odds": "16.63",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Steadily progressive in five starts on the AW during the winter, going down by a neck at Newcastle (1m; first start since being gelded) last month; just 1lb higher, but the winner finished tailed off at Nottingham on Wednesday; has a bit to prove on turf debut."
      },
      {

        "edge": "+2.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Mainly consistent in six starts as a 2yo without appearing to progress, going closest when beaten a head in a Salisbury seller (7f, heavy) in September; returns from six months off and will need to step up, especially from his wide draw; stable also runs Kameko Fever."
      },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Consistent rather than progressive in eight starts last year, the latest when fourth of seven on stable debut at Newcastle (1m, AW) in November; more will be needed back from five months off."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sole win for David Loughnane came in a Wolverhampton nursery (8.6f, AW; first-time cheekpieces) in October; picked up for 20,000gns later that month and now makes his stable debut after 174 days off; well drawn; watch market."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Didn't enjoy the smoothest of passages when beaten a short head on handicap debut at Southwell (7f, AW) ten days ago; only 1lb higher and stepping up another furlong may suit him even better, with the return to turf unlikely to be a problem; major player."

  {
    "course": "Leopardstown",

    "dist": "7f",

    "class": "Class 1",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Black Caviar Gold (IRE)",
        "jockey": "W J Lee",
        "trainer": "P Twomey",
        "ts": "100",
        "rpr": "114",
        "or": "108",
        "form": "3411-",

        "dam_sire": "Outstrip",
        "stall": 7,

        "fair_odds": "8.32",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-12.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Was well behind Pivotal Attack when third on debut at Galway (7f, yielding); hugely improved effort on third start when easily winning a 7f maiden at Cork on soft; promoted from 85 to 108 for Curragh Group 3 win (7f soft) that involved a reversal of form with Pivotal Attack; needs to sustain that improvement."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "True Love (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Ryan Moore",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "112",
        "rpr": "121",
        "or": "115",
        "form": "11218-",

        "dam_sire": "Fastnet Rock",
        "stall": 15,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "68.7",
        "model_pct": "11.8%",
        "fair_odds": "8.45",
        "best_dec": "2.63",
        "edge": "-25.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Backed up Queen Mary win when much too good for the colts in the Railway Stakes; reported slightly lame after odds-on Phoenix Stakes defeat; quickly back in the groove when beating Havana Anna in the Cheveley Park; started slowly and never posed a serious threat over 5f in the Breeders' Cup Juvenile Turf Sprint; steps up to 7f, clear pick here if coping with trip/easy ground."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Composing (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Wayne Lordan",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "99",
        "rpr": "116",
        "or": "105",
        "form": "11436-",

        "dam_sire": "Australia",
        "stall": 13,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "68.5",
        "model_pct": "11.7%",
        "fair_odds": "8.54",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-3.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Summer hat-trick culminated in Group 2 win at the Curragh, beating Suzie Songs (7f, good); beaten favourite in the Moyglare and Goffs Million at the same venue; unplaced in the Fillies' Mile on final start; officially rated 10lb below stablemate True Love."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,

        "ts": "105",
        "rpr": "102",
        "or": "-",

        "fair_odds": "11.13",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+6.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Handled soft ground when making a winning debut at this venue last July; should be able to pay her way this season, but this represents a big jump in class."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "River Ara (IRE)",

        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "91",
        "rpr": "101",
        "or": "93",

        "edge": "+4.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "No match for Black Caviar Gold in a maiden at Cork; course 1m nursery winner on her final start; stable has stronger candidates."
      },

        "rpr": "106",

        "fair_odds": "14.60",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+3.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Off the mark at the fifth attempt in fine style at Gowran, confirming the promise she showed when chasing home the very useful Geryon at the Curragh; flopped in Group 3 race won by Black Caviar Gold on final start."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,

        "ts": "87",

        "fair_odds": "15.39",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+1.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Overcame inexperience when making a winning debut in a 7f fillies' maiden at Naas last August; kept on for third behind the subsequent Prix Marcel Boussac winner Diamond Necklace in a C&D Listed race; ran poorly over 1m on heavy on final start; hooded now."
      },
      {

        "run_style": "",

        "spotlight": "Thurles maiden winner after a fine effort in a C&D Listed race (1 1.2l behind third-placed Caught U Sleeping); needs to raise her game to be competitive here."
      },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Promise over 6f on debut at Fairyhouse and then bolted up over 7f at Galway (yielding); not disgraced in the Moyglare when racing keenly; ended the season with a positive effort behind Black Caviar Gold in a Curragh Group 3; stable's Cercene was third here last year as a prelude to better things."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Suzie Songs (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Gary Carroll",
        "trainer": "G M Lyons",
        "ts": "90",
        "rpr": "110",
        "or": "101",
        "form": "1127-",
        "sire": "Starspangledbanner",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "56.6",
        "model_pct": "4.9%",
        "fair_odds": "20.41",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-3.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Caused a surprise when getting the better of hot favourite Flushing Meadows in the Anglesey Stakes; raced a bit too keenly and failed to cope with Composing in Debutante Stakes and didn't show her true form when last of seven in the Group 1 Moyglare; hooded now and not without a chance"
      },

        "stall": 9,

        "fair_odds": "27.38",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won on debut at Listowel (6f, good to yielding); good form in defeat, notably when second in a 7f Group 3 event at Chantilly on final start; well held by Black Caviar Gold on Curragh running."
      },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Placed on all three starts; capable of winning races; 77-rated filly has an unenviable task in this grade"
      },

  {
    "course": "Musselburgh",
    "time": "16:45",
    "race_name": "Sky Bet Build A Bet Fillies' Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Applesandpears (GB)",
        "jockey": "NON-RUNNER",
        "trainer": "Edward Bethell",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "84",
        "form": "211-",
        "sire": "Havana Gold",
        "dam_sire": "Cityscape",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "61.9",
        "model_pct": "17.3%",
        "fair_odds": "5.79",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Progressive in three starts last autumn, finishing runner-up on her Leicester debut (6f, good) before wins in AW novices at Chelmsford (7f) and Newcastle (6f); the longer trip should be within range on handicap debut after five months off and the market should be revealing."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Bellarchi",
        "jockey": "Oliver Stammers",
        "trainer": "Grant Tuer",
        "ts": "77",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "87",
        "form": "088-81",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Sepoy",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "10-4",
        "score": "60.6",
        "model_pct": "15.7%",
        "fair_odds": "6.39",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-6.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "3-4 over 7f here, the latest win coming on good to soft ground eight days ago; has won over this trip elsewhere and high on the list from 3lb higher."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Dunkeld Dreamer (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Pierre-Louis Jamin",
        "trainer": "K R Burke",
        "ts": "77",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "11222-",
        "sire": "Coulsty",
        "dam_sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "8-7",
        "score": "60.3",
        "model_pct": "15.2%",
        "fair_odds": "6.56",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "+3.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Record in nurseries last year read 1311222, the wins coming over 7f-8.5f; still 13lb higher than when last successful, though, so will need to hit the ground running in order to win this after 162 days off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Samra Green (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Sam James",
        "trainer": "K R Burke",
        "ts": "70",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "84",
        "form": "17-",
        "sire": "Saxon Warrior",
        "dam_sire": "More Than Ready",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "54.6",
        "model_pct": "9.9%",
        "fair_odds": "10.12",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-10.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Did it well when making a successful debut at Haydock (7f, good) last August, but found the Group 2 Rockfel at Newmarket (7f, good to firm) rather tougher the following month, not that she was disgraced in finishing seventh of 11; market should be revealing on return and she still holds an Irish 1,000 Guineas entry; stable also runs Dunkeld Dreamer."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Ice Sovereigns (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Callum Shepherd",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "73",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "85",
        "form": "43110-",
        "sire": "Ten Sovereigns",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "54.6",
        "model_pct": "9.8%",
        "fair_odds": "10.18",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-4.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won a novice and a nursery at Carlisle (7f, good) last year, but was completely out of her depth when last of ten (behind Samra Green) in the Group 2 Rockfel at Newmarket (7f, good to firm) on her final outing; this is much more realistic on her return and worth considering, especially if backed."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Callianassa",
        "jockey": "Connor Beasley",
        "trainer": "Brian Ellison",
        "ts": "63",
        "rpr": "90",
        "or": "83",
        "form": "03-155",
        "sire": "Invincible Army",
        "dam_sire": "Intikhab",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "10-0",
        "score": "48.0",
        "model_pct": "5.9%",
        "fair_odds": "16.99",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-4.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "All four wins have come over 7f/1m on the AW, the latest in February; return to this trip should suit, but she is 0-9 on turf and a few of the others make greater appeal."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Jannas Journey",
        "jockey": "Cam Hardie",
        "trainer": "Jim Goldie",
        "ts": "74",
        "rpr": "90",
        "or": "83",
        "form": "3629-0",
        "sire": "Sioux Nation",
        "dam_sire": "Holy Roman Emperor",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "10-0",
        "score": "47.6",
        "model_pct": "5.7%",
        "fair_odds": "17.49",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+3.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Enjoyed a fine time of it between July and September last year, winning seven times including over 7f here; may have needed her reappearance when well behind Bellarchi back here (7f) eight days ago, but she will need to step forward and is drawn wide; stable also runs Geo."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Asteverdi (GB)",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "James Owen",
        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "90",
        "or": "78",
        "form": "35450-",
        "sire": "Advertise",
        "dam_sire": "Kutub",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "46.6",
        "model_pct": "5.3%",
        "fair_odds": "18.87",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "-3.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lightly raced last year and ended the season quietly, but she is 2lb below her last winning mark and, although off six months, she can go well fresh; well worth a market check now starting out for another new yard."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Epidavros (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Jason Hart",
        "trainer": "Katie Scott",
        "ts": "79",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "71",
        "form": "25635-",
        "sire": "Magna Grecia",
        "dam_sire": "Dream Ahead",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "44.7",
        "model_pct": "4.6%",
        "fair_odds": "21.82",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-2.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Both wins (7.7f/1m1f) in September 2024, but 0-13 since; now back off her last winning mark, but she may just need this after 194 days off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Perfect Part",
        "jockey": "Zak Wheatley(3)",
        "trainer": "Brian Ellison",
        "ts": "77",
        "rpr": "92",
        "or": "87",
        "form": "4070-4",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Dutch Art",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "10-4",
        "score": "42.3",
        "model_pct": "3.8%",
        "fair_odds": "26.36",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-8.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-13 since her successful racecourse debut albeit highly tried on occasions, but she made a fine return when fourth of 22 in the Spring Mile at Doncaster (1m, good to soft) 15 days ago and that form has already received a boost; well drawn and a big player from the same mark; stable also runs Callianassa."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Second Fiddle (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Cara Tuke(7)",
        "trainer": "Iain Jardine",
        "ts": "54",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "69",
        "form": "131-70",
        "sire": "Fulbright",
        "dam_sire": "Equiano",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "41.4",
        "model_pct": "3.5%",
        "fair_odds": "28.19",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made it 15th-time lucky on stable debut at Hamilton (1m, soft) last September and then won five of his next six starts on the AW, but held in both outings at the start of the year; bit to prove back on turf after three months off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Geo (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Paul Mulrennan",
        "trainer": "Jim Goldie",
        "ts": "70",
        "rpr": "90",
        "or": "69",
        "form": "95564-",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Fastnet Rock",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "40.5",
        "model_pct": "3.3%",
        "fair_odds": "30.36",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "-0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "1-11 for Eve Johnson Houghton, the win coming on nursery debut at Newbury (7f, good to firm) in August 2024; possibly unlucky when fourth of 11 at Southwell (1m, AW) in October; changed hands for 9,000gns soon afterwards; market informative on stable debut after six months off."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Leopardstown",
    "time": "16:55",
    "race_name": "P.W. McGrath Memorial Ballysax Stakes (Group 3)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m2f",
    "going": "Good To Yielding",
    "class": "Class 1",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Pierre Bonnard (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Ryan Moore",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "95",
        "rpr": "114",
        "or": "113",
        "form": "4111-",
        "sire": "Camelot",
        "dam_sire": "New Approach",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-10",
        "score": "73.4",
        "model_pct": "26.3%",
        "fair_odds": "3.80",
        "best_dec": "2.00",
        "edge": "-29.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made rapid progress to become a top middle-distance prospect after winning a 1m Dundalk maiden; asserted strongly when beating stablemate Endorsement in the Zetland Stakes (1m2f, good to firm); continued his rise with a smart display to beat A Boy Names Susie on very soft ground in the Criterium de Saint-Cloud; sets the standard."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Christmas Day (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Wayne Lordan",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "100",
        "rpr": "106",
        "or": "107",
        "form": "3511-",
        "sire": "Camelot",
        "dam_sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "70.3",
        "model_pct": "19.2%",
        "fair_odds": "5.22",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "+4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Short head winner from A Boy Named Susie in the Eyrefield Stakes over 1m1f here last October; extra furlong should suit but would probably need more than a 2lb concession to account for Pierre Bonnard."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "A Boy Named Susie (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Donnacha Aidan O'Brien",
        "ts": "103",
        "rpr": "111",
        "or": "107",
        "form": "14422-",
        "sire": "Starspangledbanner",
        "dam_sire": "Montjeu",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "65.6",
        "model_pct": "12.1%",
        "fair_odds": "8.28",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "+2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Debut maiden winner; lost out by only a short head to Christmas Day in the 1m1f Eyrefield Stakes here in October on his fourth start; built on that when 2l second to Pierre Bonnard at Saint-Cloud; does not need to improve much to win a Pattern race; solid chance here."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "James J Braddock (GB)",
        "jockey": "J M Sheridan",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "107",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "21-",
        "sire": "Zarak",
        "dam_sire": "Mukhadram",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "64.0",
        "model_pct": "10.3%",
        "fair_odds": "9.74",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "+1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Promising Navan debut when strong finishing 1/2l second over 1m, despite rider losing an iron close home (yielding); impressed in beating two stablemates in testing conditions in a 1m Curragh maiden at the beginning of November; should make the grade at Pattern level"
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Italy (GB)",
        "jockey": "Chris Hayes",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "102",
        "rpr": "115",
        "or": "112",
        "form": "12238-",
        "sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "63.6",
        "model_pct": "9.8%",
        "fair_odds": "10.20",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-3.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Split the ill-fated Gewan and Distant Storm in the Acomb at York; then ran well behind Zavateri and stablemate Gstaad in National Stakes at the Curragh; repeated a hard-pulling tendency in the Dewhurst; needs to settle better to do full justice to his ability; hooded now for seasonal debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Endorsement (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Ronan Whelan",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "97",
        "rpr": "110",
        "or": "105",
        "form": "2128-",
        "sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "63.4",
        "model_pct": "9.7%",
        "fair_odds": "10.33",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Stepped up on his previous form when second to stablemate Pierre Bonnard in the Zetland last time; well held on his running at Saint-Cloud, dropping away in the final furlong."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Shosholoza (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Declan McDonogh",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "97",
        "rpr": "109",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "15-",
        "sire": "Australia",
        "dam_sire": "Acclamation",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "55.9",
        "model_pct": "4.5%",
        "fair_odds": "22.02",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "+0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Created a strong impression when beating a subsequent Curragh winner by a wide margin  on heavy ground at Tipperary on his debut; creditable fifth at Saint-Cloud only three weeks later; held by Pierre Bonnard and A Boy Named Susie but open to improvement."
      },
      {

        "edge": "+1.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Coped admirably with heavy ground on debut at the Curragh; faces a very stiff task at this level with such limited experience."
      },

  {

    "runners": [
      {

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Progressive in six starts for three different stables last year (641131) including making a successful debut for this one at Redcar (1m, good to soft) in October; has a 6lb higher mark and a 167-day absence to overcome, but she remains open to further improvement."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Sea Force (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "89",
        "rpr": "108",
        "or": "95",

        "dam_sire": "Orpen",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "65.7",
        "model_pct": "16.3%",
        "fair_odds": "6.12",
        "best_dec": "3.25",
        "edge": "-15.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won a Nottingham maiden (1m, good) and a Yarmouth handicap (1m1f, soft) last year; now 6lb higher and returns from seven months off, but he was only beaten a neck on last season's reappearance and there may well be even more to come from him this year; respected."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Impartiality (GB)",
        "jockey": "Rowan Scott",
        "trainer": "Phillip Makin",
        "ts": "96",
        "rpr": "106",
        "or": "86",
        "form": "22034-",

        "dam_sire": "Lawman",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "58.1",
        "model_pct": "9.5%",
        "fair_odds": "10.49",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-3.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won his first three starts in 2025 so the 195-day absence isn't a major concern, but he is still 12lb above his last winning mark; cheekpieces worn in last four outings removed."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Sir Paul Ramsey",
        "jockey": "Andrew Mullen",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "95",
        "rpr": "110",
        "or": "83",
        "form": "09-374",
        "sire": "Sea The Moon",
        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "8-11",
        "score": "55.5",
        "model_pct": "8.0%",
        "fair_odds": "12.56",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Just 1lb higher than for the latest of two wins on turf last year and suggested a stiffer test might suit when beaten just over a length into fourth of 12 at Lingfield (1m, AW) nine days ago; shortlisted."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Dwindling Funds (GB)",
        "jockey": "Rhys Elliott(5)",
        "trainer": "Jim Goldie",
        "ts": "97",
        "rpr": "106",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "31162-",
        "sire": "Intrinsic",
        "dam_sire": "Sakhee's Secret",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-4",
        "score": "55.1",
        "model_pct": "7.7%",
        "fair_odds": "12.96",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Only made her debut a year ago and won six times over 7f-1m2f on turf between July and October, five of them at Ayr; ended the campaign with a nose defeat here (1m, soft) and just 1lb higher, but not sure what to expect after five months off; 2lb out of the weights."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Redarna (GB)",
        "jockey": "Joanna Mason",
        "trainer": "Dianne Sayer",
        "ts": "93",
        "rpr": "104",
        "or": "79",
        "form": "86814-",
        "sire": "Aqlaam",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "8-7",
        "score": "54.4",
        "model_pct": "7.4%",
        "fair_odds": "13.55",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+3.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Showed he still had it what it takes when gaining his ninth course success at Ayr (1m, good to soft) last September and ran well despite a 10lb rise back there 12 days later; has tended to need his reappearance in recent years."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "James McHenry (GB)",
        "jockey": "Callum Rodriguez",
        "trainer": "Edward Bethell",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "105",
        "or": "92",
        "form": "2/0-94",
        "sire": "Starspangledbanner",
        "dam_sire": "Verglas",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "53.5",
        "model_pct": "6.9%",
        "fair_odds": "14.42",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three wins at about 1m and finished runner-up in the 2024 Cambridgeshire, but lightly raced since; not beaten far into fourth of ten at Kempton (1m, AW) last time, but still 5lb above his last winning mark and doesn't look solid back from another short break; stable also runs Noche Clasica."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Thunder Wonder",
        "jockey": "Callum Shepherd",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "107",
        "rpr": "111",
        "or": "85",
        "form": "8700-0",
        "sire": "Night Of Thunder",
        "dam_sire": "Casamento",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "52.8",
        "model_pct": "6.6%",
        "fair_odds": "15.17",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-3.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Efforts since last summer leave plenty to be desired, including last month's Wolverhampton reappearance (8.6f, AW; first start since being gelded); however, he is 2-2 here (1m/1m1f) and 7lb lower than when last successful; worth a second look; stable also runs Sir Paul Ramsey."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Flying Fletcher",

        "trainer": "Richard & Peter Fahey",
        "ts": "90",
        "rpr": "106",

        "stall": 9,

        "model_pct": "5.7%",
        "fair_odds": "17.64",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "+2.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Mainly seen on the Newcastle AW (3-18) and ran well to finish third of 12 off this mark there (1m) 16 days ago, but he is 0-10 on turf; others preferred."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Mirsky (GB)",
        "jockey": "Daniel Tudhope",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "88",
        "rpr": "106",

        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-8",

        "edge": "-1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won at Thirsk (1m, good to firm) in May and Epsom (8.5f, good to soft) last year, but well held in his last two starts; his record suggests this first start in 281 days may be needed."
      },
      {

        "stall": 3,

        "score": "43.9",

        "fair_odds": "28.49",
        "best_dec": "41.00",
        "edge": "+1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Four wins over 9.5f/1m2f on AW/good to soft in France, but he finished well held on stable debut in the Rosebery at Kempton (1m3f, AW) 15 days ago; may have needed the run after ten months off and the usual tongue-tie goes back on, but he still has enough to prove."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,

        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "-0.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won three of his first four starts for Ollie Sangster between July 2023 and April 2024, but has only been successful in one of his last 17 starts and that was on the AW; needs to step up from his Doncaster return (1m2f, good to soft) a fortnight ago."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Leopardstown",

    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Cape Cod (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Ryan Moore",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "74",

        "best_dec": "3.00",
        "edge": "-11.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Progressive juvenile form, placed in maidens at Punchestown and the Curragh before off the mark final start over 1m at Naas in October, making all; should stay 1m2f; type to continue improving and yard have a good recent record in this."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Madbadanddangerous (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Noel Meade",
        "ts": "73",
        "rpr": "90",

        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "62.5",
        "model_pct": "22.8%",
        "fair_odds": "4.39",
        "best_dec": "3.75",
        "edge": "-6.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Decent level of form in three outings in second half of last season, notably getting up late in 7.5f Naas auction event and slightly shorter trip against him at same venue final start when staying on third in valuable auction series final; good chance he'll improve for this step up in trip and on an okay mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Extravagant (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Wayne Lordan",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "63",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "85",
        "form": "23814-",
        "sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "dam_sire": "Kingmambo",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "52.4",
        "model_pct": "9.4%",
        "fair_odds": "10.60",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-0.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Solid maiden runs first two starts at two and off the mark on handicap debut off 80 at Killarney in August (1m, good); didn't seem to get home in heavy ground at Listowel following month but remains open to progress back on better ground and half-brother to high-class Cloth Of Stars should appreciate this trip."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Another Day Done (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Declan McDonogh",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "99",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "607-14",
        "sire": "Sottsass",
        "dam_sire": "War Command",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "8-11",
        "score": "52.1",
        "model_pct": "9.2%",
        "fair_odds": "10.93",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-0.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Nicely improved in first-time visor to handsomely win 1m Dundalk handicap in January off 63 (beating a subsequent winner); not clear run and hung right when only fourth over same C&D 10 days later off 12lb higher mark; cheekpieces now replace visor and upped in trip."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Cherry Hill Girl",
        "jockey": "Andrew Slattery",
        "trainer": "Andrew Slattery",
        "ts": "83",
        "rpr": "90",
        "or": "83",
        "form": "3613-7",
        "sire": "Belardo",
        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "52.0",
        "model_pct": "9.1%",
        "fair_odds": "10.99",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+0.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Comfortable winner of a Listowel maiden (1m, heavy) before respectable run in C&D handicap (soft); didn't count over shorter trip on last month's seasonal return at Naas, now takes a step up in trip (now really bred for it)."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Marjorie Daw (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Gary Carroll",
        "trainer": "Joseph G Murphy",
        "ts": "66",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "85",
        "form": "41-",
        "sire": "Sottsass",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "51.1",
        "model_pct": "8.4%",
        "fair_odds": "11.85",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-5.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lightly raced at two, stepping up nicely from Listowel debut to land Gowran fillies maiden over an extended mile in October, needing every yard to get back up close home (first two clear) on heavy; will be well suited by 1m2f; quicker conditions here and high enough initial mark, although open to more improvement than most"
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "So Must I (IRE)",
        "jockey": "J M Sheridan",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "57",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "80",
        "form": "9-861",
        "sire": "Sottsass",
        "dam_sire": "Le Havre",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "49.9",
        "model_pct": "7.6%",
        "fair_odds": "13.18",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-0.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Stepped up nicely on previous form to beat a stablemate and favourite (pair clear) in Dundalk rated race over slightly further than this in February; type to keep improving at this trip and rider/trainer having a good time of it of late."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Pierre Grosse (GB)",
        "jockey": "Keithen Kennedy(5)",
        "trainer": "Mrs John Harrington",
        "ts": "65",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "80",
        "form": "436-",

        "dam_sire": "Frankel",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "45.8",

        "fair_odds": "18.87",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+1.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Naas auction series final sixth was an improvement on his maiden runs before that; not too far off Madbandandangerous on that running on these revised terms and longer trip should suit."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Musselburgh",
    "time": "17:45",
    "race_name": "Sky Bet Extra Places Handicap (GBBPlus Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m4f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Velvet Whisper (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Callum Rodriguez",
        "trainer": "Edward Bethell",
        "ts": "72",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "86211-",
        "sire": "Calyx",
        "dam_sire": "High Chaparral",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "67.1",
        "model_pct": "21.5%",
        "fair_odds": "4.66",
        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "-5.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Back to life in the autumn on last three starts, beaten a neck on first occasion (good to soft) before front-running wins at Nottingham (1m2f, heavy) and Musselburgh (1m4f, soft); the ground may not be so testing for this reappearance but she's relatively lightly raced and could have more to offer."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Simple Star (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Sam James",
        "trainer": "Dianne Sayer",
        "ts": "73",
        "rpr": "93",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "45128-",
        "sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Street Cry",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "58.9",
        "model_pct": "11.5%",
        "fair_odds": "8.73",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+8.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Plentiful form at Musselburgh with three C&D wins, including last August for his only Flat win last year (5lb higher today); has a mixed reappearance record but went close in this race in 2024, so has to be considered."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Say What You See",
        "jockey": "Billy Garritty",
        "trainer": "Liam Bailey",
        "ts": "73",
        "rpr": "96",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "2211D-3",
        "sire": "Belardo",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 14,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "55.8",
        "model_pct": "9.0%",
        "fair_odds": "11.07",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-7.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Last five races in 2025 (1m2f/1m4f) saw him first past the post three times and second twice; on final start he finished well on top at Doncaster (1m2f) but was disqualified for a banned substance; only 2lb higher today and made a respectable return to action at Doncaster two weeks ago; return to 1m4f should be okay and he's one for the shortlist."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Dust Cover (GB)",
        "jockey": "Paddy Bradley",
        "trainer": "Ross Burdon",
        "ts": "59",
        "rpr": "93",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "012-11",
        "sire": "Showcasing",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 13,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "54.9",
        "model_pct": "8.5%",
        "fair_odds": "11.82",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lightly raced before finding his stride upped in trip on AW this winter, winning three of his last four starts (Southwell/Kempton) and beaten a nose in the other; all those were 1m3f but the style of them, launching late bids, gives clear scope for further improvement over this extra 1f if he's as effective on turf."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Ludo's Landing (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Jason Hart",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "92",
        "or": "78",
        "form": "73-551",
        "sire": "Kodiac",
        "dam_sire": "Canford Cliffs",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "54.2",
        "model_pct": "8.1%",
        "fair_odds": "12.42",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-4.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won off 2lb higher at Thirsk (1m4f, good) last June and returned to form with AW win at Newcastle last month; considered, but the latter win was with first headgear since 2023 and he did not back it up in that campaign."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Haveyoumissedme (GB)",
        "jockey": "Andrew Mullen",
        "trainer": "Iain Jardine",
        "ts": "36",
        "rpr": "93",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "46-352",
        "sire": "Helmet",
        "dam_sire": "Sir Percy",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "51.6",
        "model_pct": "6.6%",
        "fair_odds": "15.16",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-0.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Absent 348 days before last September but usually competitive since regaining his fitness and went down by a head last month on latest outing; tenth in this race in 2024 on his only appearance at Musselburgh but he's firmly in the mix on other counts."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Sixpack (GB)",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "James Owen",
        "ts": "74",
        "rpr": "93",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "02587-",
        "sire": "Sea The Moon",
        "dam_sire": "Kutub",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "50.6",
        "model_pct": "6.1%",
        "fair_odds": "16.46",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-0.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Beaten a nose at Goodwood (1m6f, good; 2lb lower today) last May but that's far and away the best of his six runs for James Owen, who won this race in 2024 and 2025; beaten 24l when evens for hurdling debut in October when last seen; needs a major revival."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "L'Eagle Aid",
        "jockey": "Callum Shepherd",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "88",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "5116-5",
        "sire": "Free Eagle",
        "dam_sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "48.2",
        "model_pct": "5.1%",
        "fair_odds": "19.69",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "+2.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "238 days off before his Newcastle run three weeks ago when he may well have been in need of the race and interference exacerbated his margin of defeat; possibilities if that has brought him back to his best."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Made All",
        "jockey": "Oisin Orr",
        "trainer": "Sam England",
        "ts": "77",
        "rpr": "92",
        "or": "72",
        "form": "7238-1",
        "sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Kingman",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "48.1",
        "model_pct": "5.0%",
        "fair_odds": "19.92",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-2.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Comes from off the pace; twice beaten about 2l over C&D last July; flourished elsewhere with three 1m4f turf wins last May-August and he returned from hurdling to break his AW duck at Wolverhampton last month; up 3lb today; major player if he's effective at this track."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Northwest Passage (GB)",
        "jockey": "David Nolan",
        "trainer": "Ivan Furtado",
        "ts": "73",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "80",
        "form": "46412-",
        "sire": "Ulysses",
        "dam_sire": "Linamix",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "46.1",
        "model_pct": "4.3%",
        "fair_odds": "23.22",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "-0.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Considerable improvement over 1m2f in the mud once gelded last August, but well beaten in both his hurdle races this winter; this is first run since leaving Roger Teal for 31,000gns in February and given wind surgery; not as solid as some of these but stable is among the winners."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Humble Spark",
        "jockey": "Paul Mulrennan",
        "trainer": "Jim Goldie",
        "ts": "77",
        "rpr": "92",
        "or": "78",
        "form": "3-4554",

        "dam_sire": "New Approach",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "46.0",
        "model_pct": "4.3%",
        "fair_odds": "23.34",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sometimes starts slowly; 1-11 record on turf is none too persuasive but fourth of 13 in Queen's Cup here (1m6f, soft) last week was creditable; occasionally hooded and now tries cheekpieces."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Fox Journey (GB)",
        "jockey": "Zak Wheatley(3)",
        "trainer": "Declan Carroll",
        "ts": "68",
        "rpr": "92",
        "or": "77",

        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "44.6",
        "model_pct": "3.8%",
        "fair_odds": "26.08",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-2.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "No win since May 2024 when trained by Sir Michael Stoute; below form last year for Kevin Ryan, followed by a 22,000gns sale in October; he's 23lb below his peak mark but the tide needs to turn."
      },
      {
        "rank": 13,
        "horse": "Fast Fred (GB)",
        "jockey": "Rowan Scott",
        "trainer": "Phillip Makin",
        "ts": "88",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "71",

        "fair_odds": "27.14",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-2.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Carlisle 1m3f win last July; as good as ever when second at Newcastle (1m4f, AW) one month ago; this is a warm race but he has a competitive mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 14,
        "horse": "Terrorise (GB)",
        "jockey": "Ben Robinson",
        "trainer": "Brian Ellison",
        "ts": "81",
        "rpr": "90",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "51060-",

        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 9,

        "score": "39.7",

        "fair_odds": "37.88",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won a novice hurdle last May and convincingly at York (2m, good to firm; 4lb higher today) in July; however, comfortably held twice off his revised mark, before a heavy defeat in October when last seen; had wind surgery last month and perhaps best watched this time."
      }
    ]
  },

        "run_style": "",
